question: Which statement best describes the pattern of average test scores in the Advanced Mathematics course over the semester?

options.A: Student performance improves overall from the beginning to the end of the semester.
options.B: Student performance declines overall from the beginning to the end of the semester.
options.C: Student performance fluctuates up and down with no overall upward or downward tendency.
options.D: Student performance is nearly identical in every month, with almost no variation.

explanation: The x‑axis labels are months but shown in a scrambled order, so the connected line path looks more erratic than the true pattern. If you reorder the months from January to August, the scores increase steadily from the starting value to the final month, indicating consistent improvement rather than volatility or decline.
